signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Confirms 70K ETH ($143M) Staking Commitment | YES | HIGH confidence** [4]
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Confirms 70K ETH ($143M) Staking Commitment | YES | HIGH confidence** [4]  
The foundation locked 70,000 ETH into staking, supporting ETH at $2,200-$2,250 amid recovery from $1,800 lows; analysts like Arthur Hayes project $10K-$20K targets, potentially signaling treasury strength to prediction markets.[4][1]

signals.headline: Bitcoin Spot ETFs See $129M Net Outflows on April 11 | NO | HIGH confidence** [4]
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Spot ETFs See $129M Net Outflows on April 11 | NO | HIGH confidence** [4]  
US BTC ETFs recorded outflows extending Q1 caution, with AUM at $128B but net flows lagging; contrasts ETH ETF $13B AUM, tempering bullish momentum despite price stability near $69K-$72K.[1][4]
